name: KNET Kuwait National Payment Network API
what_it_does: KNET Kuwait national payment network API (via licensed payment gateways) for Kuwaiti merchants and e-commerce platforms to accept debit card payments from KNET-branded cards issued by all Kuwaiti banks, enabling secure online payment with 3D Secure OTP authentication from Kuwait's mandatory interoperable national debit network covering all Kuwait bank accounts. Enables AI agents to manage KNET debit payment for Kuwaiti consumer checkout automation, handle 3D Secure OTP for KNET card security automation, access payment confirmation for Kuwaiti transaction verification automation, retrieve payment status inquiry for KNET transaction management automation, manage refund processing for KNET payment reversal automation, handle payment redirect for KNET authentication flow automation, access settlement data for Kuwaiti merchant reconciliation automation, retrieve gateway webhook for KNET payment event automation, manage recurring payment for Kuwaiti subscription billing automation, and integrate KNET through CBK-licensed gateways (PayPal Kuwait, MyFatoorah, Tap Payments, Checkout.com) for end-to-end Kuwaiti national debit card payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting KNET debit card payments from Kuwaiti consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Processing government fee payments via KNET for Kuwait public sector service automation agents
Integrating KNET checkout into Kuwaiti retail and restaurant POS automation agents
Receiving KNET payment webhooks for order fulfillment automation in Kuwait market agents
not_for: International payments (KNET is Kuwait domestic debit network only)
Credit card processing (KNET is debit-only; use Visa/Mastercard for credit)
Direct KNET network integration (KNET is only accessible via CBK-licensed gateways)
best_when: A Kuwaiti merchant or government entity wanting AI agents to accept payments from all Kuwaiti debit card holders through CBK-licensed payment gateways integrating with KNET's national payment infrastructure.
avoid_when: KNET IS NOT A DIRECT API — GATEWAY REQUIRED: KNET does not provide direct merchant APIs; automated direct KNET connection creates no endpoint to call; automated KNET acceptance requires integration with CBK-licensed gateway (MyFatoorah, Tap Payments, PayTabs). 3D SECURE OTP IS MANDATORY: KNET online transactions require OTP sent to cardholder's Kuwaiti mobile; automated 3D Secure bypass creates systematic decline; automated checkout must implement KNET-specific 3DS redirect. KUWAIT BUSINESS LICENSE REQUIRED: KNET merchant account requires Kuwait commercial license (MOC); automated foreign entity KNET merchant without Kuwait CR creates eligibility rejection. REDIRECT FLOW IS REQUIRED: KNET checkout requires redirecting user to KNET payment page; automated iframe or embedded payment assumption creates redirect-required error; automated must implement full-page redirect to KNET payment portal.

auth.notes: KNET accessed via CBK-licensed payment gateways with gateway-specific API key auth. REST API with JSON. Kuwait City, Kuwait. KNET established 1992 by Central Bank of Kuwait (CBK). National interoperable debit payment network. Mandatory for all Kuwaiti banks. Products: KNET debit card, KNET QR (implemented via gateways). Accessible through: MyFatoorah, Tap Payments, Checkout.com, PayTabs. All Kuwait bank accounts have KNET cards. ~2M active KNET cards. Competes with cash and Visa debit for Kuwaiti payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via gateway (MyFatoorah, Tap) free; production requires Kuwait business license
pricing.paid_tiers: Gateway-specific: typically KD 0.150 flat fee + 0.5% per KNET transaction; negotiated with gateway
pricing.notes: Kuwait City KW. CBK national payment network. Gateway-accessed. KWD. Per-transaction gateway fees.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per gateway API key; 3DS OTP authentication adds round trip; webhooks via gateway

known_agent_gotchas: KNET HAS NO DIRECT API — USE LICENSED GATEWAY: KNET network does not expose direct merchant API; automated KNET integration requires picking CBK-licensed gateway (MyFatoorah, Tap, Checkout.com); automated direct KNET connection creates no available endpoint

FULL PAGE REDIRECT REQUIRED: KNET checkout requires full-page redirect to KNET payment page hosted by gateway; automated iframe or embedded form assumption creates redirect-required error; automated KNET must use full redirect flow

3DS OTP IS MANDATORY FOR ONLINE: KNET online payments require OTP sent to cardholder's Kuwaiti mobile number; automated non-3DS flow creates systematic decline; automated must implement 3DS redirect and OTP completion before payment confirmation

KUWAIT COMMERCIAL LICENSE REQUIRED: KNET merchant acceptance requires Kuwait Ministry of Commerce business license; automated foreign entity direct KNET integration without Kuwait CR creates onboarding rejection

SETTLEMENT IN KUWAITI DINAR: KNET settles in KWD (Kuwaiti Dinar); automated USD or multi-currency settlement assumption creates currency conversion complexity; automated reconciliation must handle KWD as base currency
agent_readiness.security_notes: Kuwait national debit network. CBK regulated. PCI-DSS via gateways. KW. Card payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Kuwait national payment network. CBK. PCI-DSS via gateway. KW. Card payment data.
